changes.reason: API reference was missing the streaming chat endpoint (POST /api/chat/stream) and did not document admin authentication requirements. Setup instructions did not mention ADMIN_API_KEY.
ADMIN_API_KEY environment variable was defined in src/lib/config/env.ts and required by /api/repos and /api/index routes (via requireAdminAuth), but was absent from the example config file.

summary: Added missing POST /api/chat/stream endpoint to the README API reference table (with auth column for all routes), updated setup instructions to call out ADMIN_API_KEY alongside OPENAI_API_KEY, and added ADMIN_API_KEY to .env.example with usage instructions. All other docs (docs/architecture.md, docs/agent-system.md, docs/integrations.md, docs/roadmap.md) were found to be accurate and complete for the current implementation.
